markets.rationale: Working estimate: fair YES is about 67%. Multiple March 2026 reports say Peter Magyar and Tisza are leading Viktor Orban's Fidesz ahead of the April 12, 2026 election, so the market's roughly 62% price still looks a bit low. I am discounting that polling edge because Hungary's electoral system, incumbency advantage, media environment, and possible late-cycle pressure campaigns still create meaningful downside risk.
